RM 608 CHARLENE MITCHELL, JUDGE, CLACY/CLERK, LNAJERA/CSR CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. JONATHAN BORSTEIN FOR PLF. SYDNEY PARIS APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. CASE SETTLED, TERMS OF AGREEMENT IN CLERK'S MINUTES. JUDGEMENT PREPARED, SIGNED AND ENTERED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARIS, SYDNEY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 643 DIVISIDARO ST #103 $875.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $875.00, STAYED UNTIL JUL-31-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, DEF. TO DISMISS ANY RENT BOARD MATTERS. WRIT OF POSSESSION MAY ISSUE, EXECUTION STAYED UNTIL 31-JUL-98, SEE JUDGMENT FOR TERMS OF PAYMENTS. IF DEF. FAILS TO COMPLY PLF. MAY OBTAIN AMENDED JUDGMENT FOR $3500.
